candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conviction=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live signal has NO validated historical analog and must be sized down or vetoed despite apparent strength.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 12/30 unanimous-bull reading on USDJPY (conv=100%) with zero historical green_matches means the indicator pattern has never co-occurred with a winning outcome in the memory bank — it is an out-of-distribution configuration, not a high-confidence one. Institutional flow that produces clean unanimity at safe-haven pairs near multi-year highs (USDJPY 159.9) is typically late-stage momentum chasing, exactly what L8 warns about, and the absence of any historical match means we are extrapolating, not pattern-matching.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5  # OOD unanimity, no validated analog
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Win rate +2-4% by filtering OOD high-conviction traps; drawdown reduction on safe-haven late-momentum entries; modest Sharpe contribution via variance reduction on the worst tail trades.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Current consensus shows USDJPY dir=LONG conv=100% but green_matches=0 hist_hr=0%; EURUSD dir=SHORT conv=58% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% — every pair currently has green_matches=0, indicating the live regime has no historical winning analog, a clear UNRELIABLE-state signal under Tenet 3.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate assuming a bull-market safe-haven dynamic; with regime=UNKNOWN/MOMENTUM and USDJPY at 159.9 unanimous-bull but zero historical match, the VIX-only gate may no longer capture the actual late-momentum risk — worth confirming the gate still fires correctly in this regime.

reflection.system_health_note: System is in a no-validated-analog state (all pairs green_matches=0, regime UNKNOWN, 0 trades in 7d, TV confirmation absent at 75% sizing) — appropriate posture is reduced size and harvest-based learning, not new directional conviction.
